Author: twelvehouse
Name: ChatAnywhere
Description:
Features:
- Real-time chat streaming via Server-Sent Events
- Supports all channel types: FC, LS/CWLS 1-8, Party, Tell, Say, Shout, Yell, Alliance, and more
- Custom filters with drag-and-drop reordering, unread badges, and default send channels
- Tell mode with pin support and recent DM history
- Send queue: brief countdown after pressing Send so you can cancel accidental sends (opt-in)
- Emote picker with search and recently used, and FFXIV symbol picker
- Link previews for trusted sites (Lodestone, YouTube, Twitter/X, Twitch, and more)
- Appearance customisation: Light and Dark themes, Google Fonts, font size, coloured message backgrounds
- Passcode authentication for browser access
Punchline: Host your chat on a web server so you can talk from anywhere.
